description: This file defines a function to generate a table of contents (TOC) tree structure from a list of Markdown headings, including filtering based on heading depth and managing hierarchical relationships.

classes.name: TocEntry
classes.description: An interface extending MarkdownHeading with a children property to form a hierarchical TOC structure.

methods.name: generateToc
methods.description: Generates a hierarchical table of contents from a list of Markdown headings, filtering by depth and organizing into nested entries.

methods.name: getEntryChildrenAtDepth
methods.description: Recursively retrieves child entries at a specified depth within a TOC entry.
